Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The patient begins with Arriving A Registration RG Intake Assessment IA in sequence

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After intake assessment theres a sequence of Triage Interview TI Triage Classification TC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Based on triage classification theres an exclusive choice XOR Either CE Comprehensive ECG or FBP Full Blood Panel

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After normal results in true concurrency AI and NC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After that sequence FAS DDI Finally in true concurrency BL ICP MRF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the initial diagnostic test theres a loop structure First evaluate results this could be a tau for silent evaluation If abnormal Specialist Consultation SC Exclusive treatment choice TM or SPT Re Diagnostic Test RDT which is either FCE or FBA If normal exit the loop

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Actually looking at the description again is a loop So the process tree A is executed then either you exit the loop or you execute B and then A again

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The evaluation step itself is implicit we evaluate if results are abnormal

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Loop structure A tau silent evaluation step B SC TM or SPT FCE or FBA

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait I think I need to be more careful

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me re read the description more carefully Once the initial diagnostic test is done the results must be evaluated If the results are abnormal a loop commences

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So after the initial test CE or FBP we have a loop Inside the loop Specialist Consultation SC Exclusive treatment choice TM or SPT Re Diagnostic Test RDT either FCE or FBA If results still abnormal repeat

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So A would be the evaluation step tau silent and B would be SC TM or SPT FCE or FBA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Let me now write out the full process tree

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait I need to include the rest of the process too Let me reconstruct more carefully

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Full structure 1 A RG IA TI TC sequential start 2 X CE FBP initial diagnostic choice 3 tau SC TM or SPT FCE or FBA loop for abnormal results 4 AI NC parallel advanced diagnostics 5 FAS DDI sequential administrative steps 6 BL ICP MRF parallel final steps
